//: GENERIC IMAP/SMTP provider template — works with Fastmail, Zoho, Migadu, self-hosted, etc.
//copy: Copy the entry under mcpServers into ../.mcp.json and rename it (e.g. imap-fastmail, imap-zoho).
//server: Uses mcp-email-server (https://github.com/ai-zerolab/mcp-email-server), launched via uvx — requires `uv` installed.
//swap: Prefer a different IMAP MCP server? Replace command/args; keep the env-var pattern.
//secrets: Add the env vars below to your .env (and .env.example). Use an APP-SPECIFIC password.
//naming: Suffix the env vars per account (e.g. IMAP_ZOHO_*) so multiple IMAP mailboxes don't collide.
